title: QA & Handoff
summary: The final gate before telling the client they're live: reconcile every task, re-test ingestion, schedule training, and get CS sign-off.
overview:
This is the **last gate before the client is told they're live**. Reconcile every checkbox from earlier phases, do a client's-eye walkthrough, re-test ingestion once more, schedule training, send the welcome package, and record CS Lead sign-off.

On sign-off, the account moves into the **90-day roadmap** (setup + training → rep enablement → expansion → full-adoption target).
prerequisites: At least one real forwarded bid already ingested
tips: Do a genuine client's-eye walkthrough — log in as/with the primary contact and walk the core flow.
Confirm no verification gate from earlier phases was skipped.
Sign-off is CS Lead by default; COO signs on exception.
warnings: There is no formal go-live acceptance artifact defined in the source — see Process Gaps C-5. Record sign-off explicitly so 'done' is unambiguous.
commonMistakes: Declaring go-live without re-testing a live bid ingestion.
No recorded sign-off, so it's unclear whether the account is actually live.

steps.title: Confirm every prior task is checked off
steps.description: Reconcile every checkbox across Phases 0–4; confirm no gate was skipped.
steps.verify: No gate skipped; all prior tasks complete.

steps.title: Verify the client can access everything
steps.description: Do a client's-eye walkthrough — log in as/with the primary contact and walk the core flow.
steps.verify: Nothing broken or missing for the primary contact.

steps.title: Re-check email ingestion
steps.description: Confirm one more live/forwarded bid is ingested successfully.

steps.title: Check projects / files are visible
steps.description: Confirm files/projects are visible to the intended users at the intended org level.

steps.title: Confirm no required tasks remain (gate)
steps.description: Confirm no required tasks remain and no verification gate was skipped.

steps.title: Schedule onboarding training
steps.description: Schedule training and send the calendar invite (referenced in the client quick-start).

steps.title: Send the welcome package
steps.description: Send the welcome package to the client — letter, contacts, and 90-day roadmap.

steps.title: Final sign-off (gate)
steps.description: CS Lead final sign-off; move the account into 90-day roadmap tracking. (COO on exception.)
steps.verify: Sign-off recorded; account in roadmap tracking.

callouts.text: 90-day roadmap: Days 1–14 setup + training; 15–30 rep enablement / first projects; 31–60 expansion + monthly check-in; 61–90 full-adoption target with CS owning the relationship.

screenshots.caption: Client's-eye walkthrough — the home page a client sees, with notifications and completed extractions.
